title: Individual Planks
body:
Simple Mod that adds individual planks.

How does it work?
insted of crafting full plank blocks for wood
it crafts individual planks wich after can be crafted into full blocks

Changes:
- Now wood, logs, stripped log and wood craft 4 individual Planks
- Wooden Tools are crafted with individual planks.

Recomended to play with
Just Enough Items Mod
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei
https://modrinth.com/mod/jei

Made using Mcreator
